title: Peppery Mediterranean Runner Bean Salad
description: A quick, peppery, and tender runner bean salad that’s perfect for a weeknight Mediterranean dinner, made vegan and ready in an air fryer.
instructions: Pat the runner beans dry, trim the ends, and toss them in 1 tbsp olive oil, 1/2 tsp sea salt, 1/4 tsp black pepper, and 1 tsp red pepper flakes.
Place the seasoned beans in the air fryer basket in a single layer. Air‑fry for 10–12 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through, until tender and slightly crispy.
While the beans are cooking, combine the halved cherry tomatoes, sliced red onion, chopped parsley, and mint in a large bowl.
Drizzle 1 tbsp lemon juice and 1 tbsp extra virgin olive oil over the tomato mixture, toss gently, and season with a pinch of salt if desired.
When the beans are done, let them cool for a minute, then add them to the salad.
Add toasted pine nuts, stir everything gently to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning with more salt, pepper, or lemon juice if needed.
Serve the salad warm, at room temperature, or chilled for a refreshing bite.
